parsed.production_notes: Combines live-action smartphone footage with a 3D animated AI avatar. The avatar features stylized, rendered graphics typical of mobile applications.

characters.appearance: Young adult, fair skin, light brown hair styled in a side braid. Distinctive large gold hoop earrings.
characters.wardrobe: Wears a bright blue crewneck sweatshirt in the first half, then switches to a light grey crewneck sweatshirt.

characters.appearance: Young adult, average build, fair skin, short blonde hair.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey hoodie with black headphones resting around his neck.

characters.appearance: Adult female, slim build, dark hair pulled back neatly.
characters.wardrobe: Navy blue uniform vest worn over a white short-sleeve collared shirt.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character, fair skin, large expressive eyes, auburn hair pulled back.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue police or border control uniform shirt with a badge, epaulets, and a shoulder microphone.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, patient, with slightly exaggerated animated expressions.

scenes.setting: Airplane cabin, daytime, bright natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium shot inside an airplane cabin during the day. Character B sits in a window seat, looking up and speaking. Character C stands in the aisle, facing him. The lighting is bright, coming from the airplane window.

scenes.visual_description: A male passenger interacts with a flight attendant in an airplane aisle. Subtitles overlay the bottom of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Could I get a sparkling water and do you have any snacks that aren't peanuts?
Character C says: Of course, pretzels okay?
Character B says: Perfect, thanks.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Could I get a sparkling water
and do you have any snacks that aren't peanuts?
Of course, pretzels okay?
Perfect, thanks.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up, talking-head shot of Character A inside an airplane cabin. She is looking directly at the camera with an expressive face. The background shows the blurred interior of the airplane, including a window and seats. The lighting is natural and bright.

scenes.visual_description: A female passenger speaks directly to the camera in a vlog style, sharing her thoughts. Subtitles are centered on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: This guy talks so easy. Me? I practice "chicken or pasta" for ten minutes in my head. I need to fix this. My friend told me about this app Loora. You just talk to it. I'm trying it now.
scenes.on_screen_text:
This guy talks so easy.
Me?
I practice "chicken or pasta" for ten minutes in my head.
I need to fix this.
My friend told me about this app Loora.
You just talk to it.
I'm trying it now.

scenes.setting: Split screen: Airport border control (left) and Airport terminal (right).

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated portrait of Character D. She is resting her chin on her hand with a friendly expression. The background is a softly blurred, brightly lit airport terminal interior.

A close-up shot of Character A standing in an airport terminal. She is looking directly at the camera and smiling. The background is a brightly lit, slightly blurred airport concourse with large windows.

scenes.visual_description: Vertical split-screen showing a conversation. The left side features an animated AI officer; the right side shows a human user. Subtitles, grammar correction icons (red crosses, green checkmarks), and an app logo overlay the footage.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character D says: Hello, where are you flying?
Character A says: I fly uh London.
Character D says: Do you mean "I am flying to London"?
Character A says: Yes, sorry. I am flying to London.
Character D says: Any luggage to check in?
Character A says: Um, luggage?
Character D says: Yes, luggage. It might be bags, suitcases and other containers people use to carry their belongings when traveling.
Character A says: Oh, I have one luggage. Sorry, I'm not so good English.
Character D says: Do you mean "My English isn't that good"? No worries. How many times have you spoken in English over the past month?
Character A says: Um, actually I didn't.
Character D says: So how do you expect to speak fluently?
Character A says: I not have anyone to practice with.
Character D says: Just download Loora. We'll speak together daily and you'll be fluent in no time.
Character A says: That's amazing. I'm adding this to my daily routine today.
